title: Jeffrey Epstein's former assistant Lesley Groff interviewed by House panel
summary_full: Groff worked for Epstein for nearly 20 years, and her name appears more than 150,000 times in the Epstein files released by the Department of Justice.
summary_public: Groff worked for Epstein for nearly 20 years, and her name appears more than 150,000 times in the Epstein files released by the Department of Justice.
